top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' 
  AND r.driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM results r2
    JOIN races ra2 ON r2.raceId = ra2.raceId
    WHERE ra2.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
    GROUP BY r2.driverId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
  );

  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' 
  AND r.driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM results r2
    JOIN races ra2 ON r2.raceId = ra2.raceId
    WHERE ra2.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
    GROUP BY r2.driverId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
  );

WITH accident_counts AS (
  SELECT r.driverId, COUNT(*) AS accident_count
  FROM results r
  JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
  JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
  WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
    AND (s.status LIKE '%Accident%' OR s.status LIKE '%Collision%' OR s.status LIKE '%Spun%')
  GROUP BY r.driverId
  ORDER BY accident_count DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT accident_count
FROM accident_counts;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' 
  AND r.driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM results r2
    JOIN races ra2 ON r2.raceId = ra2.raceId
    WHERE ra2.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
    GROUP BY r2.driverId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
  );
